chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, AT KARACHI Const. Petition No.S-260 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ____________________________________________________________ Directions. 1. For orders as to maintainability of petition. 2. For orders on CMA No.4448/2025 <><><> 26.06.2025. Mr. Ahmed Hussain Jokhio, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Asif Rasheed, Advocate for Respondent. <><><> By consent of both the learned counsels for the parties and in the presence of the Respondent, it is ordered as follows:-  That the Respondent shall come to Lahore to meet the minor, in the absence of the Petitioner, for four hours from 2.00 p.m. to 06.00 p.m. each day after every 45 days at House No.172, Block No.5, Sector D-2, Depo Stop, near Dr. Latif Clinic, Green Town, Lahore. The said arrangement will commence from 11th July 2025.  The minor will be dropped off to the above location by the Petitioner for the time stipulated above.  The travelling expenses of the Respondent shall be borne by the Petitioner.  The above noted arrangement shall be followed till the pendency of G & W Application No.1765/2024.  The Petitioner shall inform the Respondent about the residence, schooling and general welfare and wellbeing of the minor. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with listed application. JUDGE Nadeem/PA
